meta.title: ReviewNudge launches internationally July 20
meta.description: ReviewNudge launches internationally Monday, July 20. We’re taking a few extra days to make the first release more welcoming for people whose first language isn’t English.

hero.title: ReviewNudge launches internationally Monday.
hero.body: We know our July 15 launch date has passed. As launch day arrived, we realized that people whose first language isn’t English deserved more than a token nod. We’re taking a few extra days to make ReviewNudge’s first release genuinely international.
hero.offerStrong: One clear place for customer review activity.
hero.offerBody: Review links, follow-ups, customer status, and team visibility without turning review management into a marketing-platform project.

launch.title: Monday, July 20, 2026
launch.body: You won’t have to wait long. ReviewNudge launches internationally on Monday, with a more welcoming experience for people whose first language isn’t English.
launch.messageItem1: Our original July 15 launch date has passed.
launch.messageItem2: We’re using the additional days to make the launch meaningful for people who use languages other than English.
launch.messageItem3: International launch access opens Monday, July 20.

updates.label: What's coming
updates.step1Body: Send review requests from a clean workspace when the customer experience is still fresh.
updates.step2Body: See which customers have been contacted, which requests need attention, and what follow-up is next.
updates.step3Body: Build a more consistent review process without adding complexity to the day.

preview.title: A cleaner way to manage review requests.
preview.body: ReviewNudge is built around one simple workspace for review links, customer status, follow-ups, and team visibility.
preview.reminderBody: Keep the follow-up moving without losing track.

footer.launch: © 2026 Et al Solutions LLC. ReviewNudge™ and Portmason™ are marks of Et al Solutions LLC.
